narrative:
Trenton 6 (precinct in Butler County) has 1,312 registered voters, with 67.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a clear Republican lean of 11.8 percentage points.
